objective: Implement the SimulatedFlashProvider harness with strict isolation and persistent simulated classification.
deliverables: Synthetic-device provider with configurable delay/failure/disconnect/outcomeUnknown scenarios.
Isolation proofs: no real connectKey acceptance and no external tool launches.
Simulated evidence classification that can never enter the hardware support matrix.

verification.expectedEvidence: Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/flashing/spec.md#AC-FLASH-006-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
A simulated flash Job exercises journal, cancellation and reconcile with zero real connectKey, zero external tool launches, and its manifest/evidence is persistently classified simulated.

stopConditions: The simulated provider can receive a real binding or process executor.
A simulated run is recordable as real-hardware evidence.
